description: A sandwich built around a cooked ground-beef patty served in a bun, often with lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, cheese, and condiments. The term can also cover broader burger styles with different toppings or proteins.
preparation_steps: Cook the patty on a grill or pan until done to the desired level.

health_advice.benefits: Provides substantial protein and can be made more balanced with vegetables and leaner meat.
health_advice.risks: Calories, saturated fat, and sodium can rise quickly with large patties, cheese, bacon, and rich sauces.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Choose a moderate portion, include vegetables, and avoid excessive sauces and fried sides.

dietary_notes.note: The classic version is non-vegetarian, but vegetarian and vegan burgers are common. Gluten-free buns are needed for a gluten-free version.
